scripts.build:worker: npm run build:py-worker && npm run build:rs-worker
scripts.verify:rust-auto-extraction: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-auto-extraction-compat.mjs prepare && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/verify-rust-auto-extraction-compat.ps1 && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-auto-extraction-compat.mjs compare
scripts.verify:rust-ss-auto: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.mjs prepare && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.ps1 && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-ss-auto-compat.mjs prepare && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/verify-rust-ss-auto-compat.ps1 && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-ss-auto-compat.mjs compare
scripts.verify:rust-origin-export: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-origin-export-compat.mjs prepare && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/verify-rust-origin-export-worker.ps1 -Mode process && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-origin-export-compat.mjs plan && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/verify-rust-origin-export-worker.ps1 -Mode export && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/verify-rust-origin-export-compat.mjs compare
scripts.bench:phase3: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.mjs prepare && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.ps1 -RequestSet process && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.mjs prepare-rust-analysis && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.ps1 -RequestSet analysis && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/bench-device-analysis-phase3.mjs analyze
scripts.build:web:desktop: npm run build:assessment-wasm && npm run build:xlsx-wasm && vite build --base ./
scripts.build: npm run build:assessment-wasm && npm run build:xlsx-wasm && vite build --base ./
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.desktop.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && npm run verify:nls && npm run verify:rs-worker-artifacts
scripts.build:desktop: npm run generate:icons && npm run verify:icons && node scripts/build-desktop.mjs
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run verify:py-worker && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run verify:py-worker && electron-builder
scripts.dist:desktop:store: npm run build:desktop && npm run verify:py-worker && electron-builder --win appx --publish never --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
